untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of multi-bar patterns (congestion area formation over 3+ bars with specific sequencing: high followed by 2 lower closes, or low followed by 2 higher closes) and waiting period logic (10-day delay after breakouts). The backtest engine lacks bar-sequence pattern matching, multi-bar lookback with conditional logic, and time-based holding rules keyed to prior price action. Simplified conditions above capture approximate entry/exit but lose critical pattern recognition and waiting period requirements.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_4 is a complex multi-bar pattern detector with temporal logic. Attempted approximation uses consecutive close comparisons, but cannot encode: (1) the exact 3-bar sequence for congestion tops/bottoms, (2) the tick-tolerance rule for near-unchanged closes, (3) the 10-day waiting period conditional on prior breakout magnitude, or (4) the distinction between initial formation and cancellation. A proper implementation requires custom pattern detection logic outside standard indicator conditions.
